span.hero: Comprehensive office renovation & fit-out. Moscow & Region. 5-year guarantee.
section1.subtitle: Advantages
section1.description: Office renovation – a new path to success and prestige
section1.block.text1: An engineer-estimator will visit within 3 hours to calculate the exact cost
section1.block.text2: Work is carried out within clearly defined сроки according to the contract and in strict compliance with building standards
section1.block.text3: To speak with a specialist, please call
section2.h1: Take a fresh look at your business
section2.desc: The company "ASKA" offers a full range of services for restoration, complete or partial replacement of non-load-bearing structures and engineering systems — turnkey office renovation. With the installation of the latest equipment and lighting systems, as well as the replacement of finishes and furniture, the atmosphere, style, and character of the entire space will be transformed.
section3.p1: What work is included in a high-quality major office renovation?
section3.p2: Obtaining a technical report on the admissibility and safety of previously completed work. Assessing the condition (degree of wear, extent of damage) of utilities and structures, determining the procedure and cost of their restoration.
section3.item.li1: Dismantling partitions and old finishes down to load-bearing structures.
section3.item.li2: Construction of partitions according to the project: aerated concrete, brick, etc.
section3.item2.li1: Elimination of minor irregularities and defects from rough preparation.
section4.h1: 6 reasons to choose us as your contractor
section4.text1: You have probably encountered a situation where you need to call a specialist and are told "we’ll come tomorrow" due to traffic and other reasons. That never happens with us! A specialist will arrive within an hour. We value your time!
section4.text2: We use materials efficiently and provide photo and video reports of the work carried out on-site. Full transparency in material usage. Everything is clear and honest with us!
section4.text3: We take care of sourcing, purchasing high-quality materials, and delivering them to the site. Working with wholesale suppliers allows us to reduce your costs by up to 30%.
section4.text4: We work in strict accordance with a contract signed by both parties. We follow the work schedule and deadlines. If we miss a deadline, we pay compensation.
section4.text5: You don’t have to worry about construction waste or finding people for loading and unloading. We handle everything ourselves. Full project support and management are on us.
section4.text6: We provide a detailed and accurate cost estimate, listing every operation. There are no surprises like "this wasn’t included in the original estimate." We only discuss discounts, not price increases.
section5.span2: If you would like us to feature your renovation in our portfolio, please let us know
section6.title: Our clients

section7.text3: Thank you very much for your help and support!

section1.1.p: We create modern, ergonomic, and attractive interiors that help your business grow and inspire employees.
section2.1.subtitle1: Smart space planning. We consider employee movement, relaxation areas, and lighting standards for maximum productivity.
section2.1.subtitle2: You will see your future office before the renovation begins. Detailed work on textures, lighting, and furniture layout.
section2.1.subtitle3: We monitor construction progress at every stage to ensure the result fully matches the approved design project.
section2.1.p: A comprehensive approach to space creation: from the first sketch idea to full project implementation.
section3.1.p: A modern office is not just a workplace — it’s a powerful tool for attracting talent and maintaining your company’s image.
section4.1.title: SERVICE PRICING
section4.1.p: Choose the right service package depending on your needs and budget.
